title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.28 — VU METERS NOW AGREE WITH THE VERTICAL METERS. User: the VU readings should match the L/R bars. They could not: the bars read dBFS TRUE PEAK off outputTruePeakL/R with instant attack + 0.82/frame decay over -60..0, while the VU read RMS against a 0 VU = -18 dBFS reference — a different quantity AND a different reference, so a -11.3 dBFS signal showed -11.3 on the bar and about -2 on the needle. FIX: the VUs now read the SAME outputTruePeakL/R atomics with the SAME ballistics (instant attack, disp = max(in, disp*0.82)) and report plain dBFS, so both displays print the same number. FACE RESCALED to -50..+3 dBFS via one shared dbToDeg() used by BOTH the needle and the printed marks (they cannot drift apart). WATTS ARC FIXED: its marks were evenly spaced, which a power scale does not do — audio power is 10 dB/decade, so they now sit at their true angles (100 W at 0 dBFS, 10 at -10, 1 at -20, .1 at -30, .01 at -40, .001 at -50). DECIBELS arc relabelled -50..+3 dBFS. Dead RMS plumbing (outputRmsL/R, outSq accumulators) removed. VERIFY IN ABLETON: needle and bar should now read the same dB for the same signal; watt marks line up with their dB marks a decade per 10 dB. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces.
